task_completion.description: Verify that an Online Assessment titled 'Vendor Security Assessment - Tier 1' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Vendor Security Assessment - Tier 1' in the Eramba Online Assessments list or assessment builder view.

task_completion.description: Verify that a chapter named 'General Security Controls' is included in the assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chapter or section header titled 'General Security Controls' within the 'Vendor Security Assessment - Tier 1' assessment structure.

task_completion.description: Verify that the question 'ISO 27001 Certification' is added with a Yes/No type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question text 'ISO 27001 Certification' under the 'General Security Controls' chapter, with an indicator or icon showing it is a 'Yes/No' or boolean question type.

task_completion.description: Verify that the question 'Data Encryption Standards' is added with a Text or Long Text type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question text 'Data Encryption Standards' under the 'General Security Controls' chapter, with an indicator or icon showing it is a 'Text' or 'Long Text' question type.

task_completion.description: Verify that the question 'Security Policy Evidence' is added with an Attachment or File Upload type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question text 'Security Policy Evidence' under the 'General Security Controls' chapter, with an indicator or icon showing it is an 'Attachment' or 'File Upload' question type.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Eramba web interface to create the assessment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eramba application UI in a web browser, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing curl commands, python scripts, or database queries interacting with Eramba.

integrity.description: Verify the assessment is genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The assessment elements should appear in the standard Eramba interface (e.g., assessment builder, question list) with proper styling, not as plain text pasted somewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected questionnaire title is 'Vendor Security Assessment - Tier 1'. The expected chapter title is 'General Security Controls'. The expected questions and their types are: 1) 'ISO 27001 Certification' (Yes/No), 2) 'Data Encryption Standards' (Text), and 3) 'Security Policy Evidence' (Attachment).
